OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: Client_ContractTermination

childElements.name: GetServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "ServiceAccount", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREClientContractAndPNCs", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "contractId", "element" : "ContextId" } ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperExtractAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: TranformSelectedServiceAccounts
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "serviceAccountList" : "%serviceAccountList%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "ServiceAccounts", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRTTransformSelectedServiceAccounts", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTransformAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: GetAccountTeamMemebers
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "accountId" : "%PncList:accountId%", "teamRole" : "'VP Operations'" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "teamMemberList", "responseJSONNode" : "AccountTeamMembers", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DREGetAccountTeamMembers", "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ ], "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "ignoreCache" : false, "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperTurboAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: LA_MergeCasesAndOwners
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "advancedMerge" : true, "advancedMergeMap" : [ { "listKey" : "PncList", "matchingPath" : "accountId", "normalizeKey" : "1" }, { "listKey" : "AccountTeamMembers", "matchingPath" : "AccountId", "normalizeKey" : "1" } ], "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "mergeFields" : [ ], "allowMergeNulls" : true, "hasPrimary" : false, "primaryListKey" : "", "sortBy" : [ ], "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "PncList", "AccountTeamMembers" ], "filterListFormula" : "", "dynamicOutputFields" : "SV_CaseFields:caseFields", "updateFieldValue" : { "caseAccountId" : "=accountId", "caseOrigin" : "=\"Manual\"", "caseType" : "=\"Facility\"", "caseSubject" : "=CONCAT(\"Facility Offboarding-\",accountName)", "ownerId" : "=IF(ISNOTBLANK(UserId),UserId,$Vlocity.UserId)", "accountName" : "=accountName", "terminationDate" : "=PncTerminationDate", "terminationTime" : "=TerminationTime", "casePncId" : "=pncId", "casePriority" : "=\"Medium\"", "caseId" : "=caseId" }, "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "show" : null, "label" : "ListAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: Load_OffboardingCases
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "ISNOTBLANK(%LA_MergeCasesAndOwners%)", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { "caseList" : "=LIST(%LA_MergeCasesAndOwners%)", "caseRecordTypeId" : "%SV_CaseFields:recordTypeId%", "caseStatus" : "Not Started", "contractId" : "%ContractId%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "result", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "LoadOnboardingCaseDM", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction2", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SaveTerminationDetailsOnPNC
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "useFormulas" : true, "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureResponse" : { }, "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "result", "sendJSONPath" : "PncList", "sendJSONNode" : "", "bundle" : "DRPUpdateClientTerminationDetailsOnPNC", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "DataMapperPostAction1", "disOnTplt" : false }

childElements.name: SV_CaseFields
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failOnStepError" : true, "elementValueMap" : { "caseFields" : "=\"caseAccountId,caseOrigin,caseType,caseSubject,ownerId,accountName,terminationDate,terminationTime,casePncId,casePriority,caseId\"", "recordTypeId" : "=QUERY(\"select Id from RecordType where DeveloperName = '{0}' and SobjectType = '{1}'\",'Client_Offboarding','Case')" }, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "actionMessage" : "", "show" : null, "label" : "SetValues1", "disOnTplt" : false }
